title: Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir Rhenock
tagline: Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir Rhenock — spiritual town of Sikkim

heroImage.alt: Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir Rhenock, Sikkim

overview.short: Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir, also called Ganesh Mandir, is a Hindu temple of Ganesha.
overview.description: Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir, also called Ganesh Mandir, is a Hindu temple of Ganesha. It is located in Rhenock, Pakyong district, Sikkim, India. Sri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir was inaugurated by Shri Dinesh Chandra, general secretary of Vishva Hindu Parishad accompanied by the former chief minister, Shri Pawan Chamling, at a beautiful landscape of Rundung Village in Rhenock on 3 October 2016. This massive religious infrastructure of Hindu accords 51 faces of Lord Ganesha, with 12 feet each 16 of them placed at corridor towards temple's main entrance.

topPlaces.name: Rhenock
topPlaces.description: Rhenock (Nepali pronunciation: [rinak]) is a town, just 29 km from Pakyong City in the Pakyong district in Sikkim, India, located on the border with the Kalimpong district of West Bengal. It lies 63 kilometres east of Gangtok, and 47 kilometres north of Kalimpong on the way to Jelepla Pass at an altitude of 1,040 metres.

topPlaces.name: Pedong
topPlaces.description: Pedong is a town in the Pedong CD block in the Kalimpong subdivision of the Kalimpong district in the Indian state of West Bengal. The town is very close to Resi-Sikkim border.

topPlaces.name: Bich Kagay
topPlaces.description: Bich Kagay is a village in the Kalimpong II CD block in the Kalimpong Sadar subdivision of the Kalimpong district in West Bengal, India

topPlaces.name: Aritar, Sikkim
topPlaces.description: Aritar is a hill station in the Pakyong District under Rongli Sub-Division of the Indian state of Sikkim.

topPlaces.name: Rorathang
topPlaces.description: Rorathang is a town situated in the bank of Rangpo River on National Highway-717A, in Pakyong District of Sikkim, India.

topPlaces.name: Rangpo River
topPlaces.description: River Rangpo is a river in the Indian state of Sikkim. A major tributary of the Teesta River, it originates from Menmecho Lake near Dzuluk and flows through Rongli and Pakyong subdivision villages in Pakyong District towards Rorathang, Kumrek and Rangpo.

topPlaces.name: Tareythang
topPlaces.description: Tareythang (also spelled as Tarethang) is a village located in Pakyong sub division at the Pakyong District of Sikkim state in India. This village is about 1250 m above sea level with a sub-tropical climate.

topPlaces.name: Takchang
topPlaces.description: Takchang (Takshang) is a village near Pakyong in Pakyong District, India. Takchang is 30.7 km from Gangtok and the population of the village is nearly 550-600.

It lies 63 kilometres east of Gangtok, and 47 kilometres north of Kalimpong on the way to Jelepla Pass at an altitude of 1,040 metres.

River Rangpo is a river in the Indian state of Sikkim. A major tributary of the Teesta River, it originates from Menmecho Lake near Dzuluk and flows through Rongli and Pakyong subdivision villages in Pakyong District towards Rorathang, Kumrek and Rangpo.

Tareythang (also spelled as Tarethang) is a village located in Pakyong sub division at the Pakyong District of Sikkim state in India. This village is about 1250 m above sea level with a sub-tropical climate.
Takchang (Takshang) is a village near Pakyong in Pakyong District, India. Takchang is 30.7 km from Gangtok and the population of the village is nearly 550-600.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir Rhenock?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir Rhenock is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir Rhenock?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pakyong Airport, Gangtok (8 km) and the nearest railway station is Siliguri Junction (55 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir Rhenock?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir Rhenock at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir Rhenock?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir Rhenock start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Viswa Vinayaka Mandir Rhenock?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rhenock, Pedong, Bich Kagay, Aritar, Sikkim, Rorathang.
